creator: r.gruyters@yirdis.nl
text:
Please, also add the following patch.

--- /usr/ports/www/py-prewikka/pkg-plist        Mon Jul 31 09:10:06 2006
+++ pkg-plist   Wed Aug 16 14:11:11 2006
@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/SensorAlertListing.py
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/About.py
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/FilterEdition.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/FilterListing.py
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/ErrorTemplate.py
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/Command.py
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/MessageSummary.py
@@ -53,6 +54,7 @@
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/SensorAlertListing.pyc
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/About.pyc
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/FilterEdition.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/FilterListing.pyc
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/ErrorTemplate.pyc
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/Command.pyc
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/MessageSummary.pyc
@@ -75,6 +77,7 @@
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/SensorAlertListing.pyo
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/About.pyo
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/FilterEdition.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/FilterListing.pyo
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/Command.pyo
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/ErrorTemplate.pyo
  %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/prewikka/templates/MessageSummary.pyo
